description: Fix all 159 TypeScript errors in the packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/ directory and related files (hooks/useAuth.ts, hooks/useTheme.ts, themes/*.ts, components/Chat/ChatBubble.tsx). These errors cascade to all apps that reference shared-ui. The errors are: 1) unused imports/variables (TS6133/TS6196), 2) possibly undefined values (TS2532/TS18048), 3) type mismatches (TS2322/TS2345/TS2339), 4) cannot invoke possibly undefined (TS2722). Fix each file in packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/ plus the hooks and themes files.
steps: Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/animation-engine.ts - 18 errors: remove unused imports (Keyframe, GestureAnimation, TimelineEntry), add null checks for possibly undefined values, fix onComplete missing from AnimationConfig type, fix type assignment for easing function

Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/charts-engine.ts - ~55 errors: remove unused PathData, add null/undefined checks for array element access (noUncheckedIndexedAccess), fix possibly undefined objects in curve calculations
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/state-manager.ts - 9 errors: fix Dispatch type incompatibility with ThunkAction, fix unused variables, fix type assertions
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/keyboard-shortcuts.ts - ~16 errors: fix unused variables, add null checks, fix property access on possibly undefined
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/rich-text-editor.ts - ~13 errors: fix unused imports, add null checks, fix type narrowing
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/theme-engine.ts - ~12 errors: fix unused imports, add null checks for color parsing
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/map-engine.ts - ~11 errors: fix property access on possibly undefined, fix viewport calculations
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/charts-engine.ts remaining errors
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/drag-drop.ts - ~6 errors: fix unused variables, add type narrowing
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/form-library.ts - ~4 errors: fix imports and type issues
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/image-gallery.ts - ~5 errors: fix unused vars and null checks
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/responsive-hooks.ts - ~6 errors: fix property access types
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/date-picker.ts - ~4 errors: fix unused imports, null checks
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/router.ts - ~5 errors: fix unused imports, type issues
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/command-palette.ts - ~2 errors
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/infinite-scroll.ts - ~1 error
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/toast-system.ts - ~1 error
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/advanced/virtual-list.ts - ~2 errors
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/hooks/useAuth.ts - ~3 errors: fix type issues with auth context
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/hooks/useTheme.ts - ~1 error: fix theme type import
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/themes/dark.ts, light.ts, neon.ts - ~3 errors: fix theme type conformance
Fix packages/shared-ui/src/components/Chat/ChatBubble.tsx - ~1 error
Verify: run NODE_OPTIONS='' node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --project packages/shared-ui/tsconfig.json and confirm zero errors
acceptance_criteria: NODE_OPTIONS='' node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit --project packages/shared-ui/tsconfig.json reports zero errors
All existing vitest tests in packages/shared-ui still pass
No use of 'any' type - all fixes use proper type narrowing, non-null assertions only where logically safe, or type guards
findings: All 159 errors resolved in a single pass. Fix patterns used: (1) Removed 18 unused imports across files, (2) Used non-null assertions (!) only where prior bounds checks or length checks guarantee the value exists, (3) Used nullish coalescing (??) for array indexing with sensible defaults, (4) Prefixed truly unused function parameters with underscore, (5) Removed dead-code variable assignments, (6) Fixed Dispatch type incompatibility with 'as unknown as Dispatch' cast since baseDispatch has narrower input type than Dispatch which accepts ThunkAction. Built packages/common first to resolve TS6305 errors in themes/hooks that reference @quant/common. Prettier reformatted files during commit (lint-staged). NODE_OPTIONS='' required for git commit hooks.
